query:
UPDATE ai_assessments
SET
  fraud_indicators = '[
    "Damage photographs detected in source document but not yet processed through the photo analysis pipeline. Manual review recommended."
  ]',
  fraud_risk_level = 'low',
  fraud_score_breakdown_json = '{
    "overallScore": 5,
    "level": "minimal",
    "correctedAt": "2026-03-21",
    "correctionReason": "Original indicator no_damage_photos (score 15) was incorrect. Input recovery confirmed images are present on pages 3-4 of the source PDF but were not ingested into the photo analysis pipeline. Correct indicator is photos_not_ingested (score 5).",
    "indicators": [
      {
        "indicator": "photos_not_ingested",
        "category": "documentation",
        "score": 5,
        "description": "Damage photographs detected in source document but not yet processed through the photo analysis pipeline. Manual review recommended."
      }
    ],
    "damageConsistency": {
      "score": 72,
      "notes": "Assessor declared claim authentic. Chain collision mechanism (insured strikes third party rear, third party strikes vehicle ahead) is mechanically consistent with reported damage zones. Score raised from 50 to 72 on assessor declaration and collision mechanism plausibility."
    }
  }',
  cost_intelligence_json = '{
    "expectedRepairCostCents": 342000,
    "documentedAgreedCostCents": 257600,
    "documentedAgreedCostUsd": 2576.00,
    "documentedOriginalQuoteCents": 473628,
    "documentedOriginalQuoteUsd": 4736.28,
    "quotesReceivedCount": 3,
    "assessorSavingsUsd": 2160.28,
    "quoteDeviationPct": -24.68,
    "quoteDeviationNote": "Deviation calculated against AI expected cost (USD 3,420). Agreed cost (USD 2,576) is the assessor-negotiated figure from 3 submitted quotes.",
    "marketValueUsd": 17000,
    "repairToValuePct": 15.2,
    "totalLossThresholdPct": 70,
    "totalLossRisk": false,
    "recommendedRange": {"lowCents": 273600, "highCents": 410400},
    "savingsOpportunityCents": 0,
    "breakdown": {
      "partsCostCents": 252000,
      "labourCostCents": 90000,
      "paintCostCents": 0,
      "hiddenDamageCostCents": 0,
      "totalCents": 342000
    },
    "labourRateUsdPerHour": 25,
    "marketRegion": "ZW",
    "currency": "USD",
    "correctedAt": "2026-03-21",
    "correctionReason": "Quote was embedded in assessor PDF but not ingested by pipeline. Agreed cost USD 2,576 and market value USD 17,000 recovered from source document."
  }'
WHERE id = 2100001 AND claim_id = 2730001;
command:
